description: Code treats the cache as authoritative so an eviction or restart silently loses data or returns nothing.
body: Failure mode: code treats the cache as authoritative and writes only there (or reads with no origin fallback), so an eviction or restart silently loses data or returns empty. Detection signals: data disappears after a cache flush or restart; missing-key reads return empty instead of loading from the store. Do not store the only copy of state in a cache. Safer fallback: keep the datastore authoritative, treat a cache miss as a normal load-from-origin path, and never persist unique state solely in the cache.
